body.thing: ShimLoopThread stamps device_id so loop-thread logs reach the per-device JSON sink
body.intention: A stdlib log emitted from a ShimLoopThread body lands as a JSON record under logs/<device>/info/ with device_id set

body.why: DiagnosticBase installs the JSON sink but does not stamp device_id process-wide; without the contextualize wrap in the thread body, every dispatch/health record is silently dropped (the stale-log failure this lineage keeps hitting)
